description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled toaster with a trapezoidal blue body and a metallic silver top. The toaster features two wide slots on the top, each holding a slice of bread, and a brown lever in the center for lowering the bread. A yellow rectangular button or lever is visible on one side, likely for controlling the toasting function. The front face is plain, while the back has a circular detail resembling a power or reset button. The toaster's surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, with subtle wear marks on the metallic top, suggesting regular use.
description: A compact blue and silver toaster with two bread slots, a brown lever, and a yellow side button, featuring a retro design and smooth, glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue body, metallic top, and brown lever, with a yellow button visible on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the yellow button protruding from the side and the brown lever on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a circular detail resembling a power or reset button, with the brown lever and bread slices visible on top.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the yellow button on the right and the brown lever on top, with the blue body and metallic top clearly visible.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide rectangular slots on the top, spaced evenly, each holding a slice of bread.
